solution: 
class Solution:
    def maxScoreSightseeingPair(self, values: List[int]) -> int:
        max_score = float('-inf')
        max_val = values[0] + 0
        for i in range(1, len(values)):
            max_score = max(max_score, max_val + values[i] - i)
            max_val = max(max_val, values[i] + i)
        return max_score

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a single pass through the array to keep track of the maximum score and the maximum value seen so far. It uses a single variable to store the maximum score and updates it whenever a better score is found. The time complexity is O(n) and the space complexity is O(1), making it efficient for large inputs.
